text: As I move through the sleek, glass-encased corridor and then stand before the vivid, information-laden wall labeled 'R+D,' I feel a profound curiosity and anticipation. The architecture and design here are so deliberate—inviting contemplation about the nature of progress, collaboration, and the intersection of creativity and knowledge. I am reminded of the perpetual tension between containment and expansion; glass walls both expose and separate, while ideas on display invite both scrutiny and inspiration. I feel energized, slightly awed, and aware of the transformation that occurs when spaces—and minds—are devoted to research and development.
